channel.title: makecode on Code it Yourself...
channel.description: Recent content in makecode on Code it Yourself...

item.title: Programming for Kids with Microsoft MakeCode and Circuit Playground Express
item.description: Want to teach programming to your kids? Come and learn with Carlos Mendible and his daughter as they shows you Microsoft MakeCode to bring computer science to children using fun tutorials and Adafruit’s Circuit Playground Express.
